name: tsao-dft
description: DFT-first scientific workflow Skills for molecular and periodic calculations, provenance, ML and kinetics.

interface.shortDescription: Auditable DFT research from structure to evidence
interface.longDescription: Routes molecular and periodic DFT through reviewed structures, method fingerprints, preflight, technical validation, HPC provenance, optional ML/kinetics, and claim/figure gates. Scientific engines are not bundled.
defaultPrompt: Use $tsao-dft-suite to build a DFT-first project graph and stop before expensive execution.
Use $tsao-dft-researcher for a validated Gaussian/Multiwfn/VMD molecular workflow.
Use $tsao-periodic-dft-materials to preflight and parse VASP, QE, or CP2K evidence.
